title: [3D] Awkward Potion to Beer
description: This pack replaces the old and boring awkward potion with a new and cool mineken beer.
body:
This texture pack will replace your boring and old awkward potion with a new model of mineken beer!

useful for roleplays and partying.

please note that I do NOT condone any use of alcohol or any other substances.

it's also translucent
